items.label: Shield Check
items.description: Run WholesomeShield on this post or comment now.

automatic_moderation.label: Automatic moderation
automatic_moderation.helpText: Automatically scan new posts and comments for unsafe content.

moderate_posts.label: Scan posts
moderate_posts.helpText: Scan new posts, post updates, report events, and recent post scans.

moderate_comments.label: Scan comments
moderate_comments.helpText: Scan new comments, comment report events, and unmoderated comments.

remove_unsafe_content.label: Remove unsafe content
remove_unsafe_content.helpText: Remove posts and comments when WholesomeShield detects a high-confidence violation.

remove_reported_posts.label: Remove heavily reported posts
remove_reported_posts.helpText: Automatically remove posts when they reach the report threshold.

report_removal_threshold.label: Report removal threshold
report_removal_threshold.helpText: Remove a post after this many reports. Default is 5; values above 100 are capped.

leave_warning_comment.label: Leave warning comment
leave_warning_comment.helpText: Reply publicly with the rule reason when content is removed.

send_private_warning.label: Send private warning
send_private_warning.helpText: Send the author a private Reddit warning message after a violation.

comment_on_clean_posts.label: Comment on clean posts
comment_on_clean_posts.helpText: Leave an automatic thank-you comment on new posts that pass WholesomeShield scanning.

clean_post_comment_message.label: Clean post comment message
clean_post_comment_message.helpText: Customize the automatic thank-you comment. Use {username} for the author and {subreddit} for the community.
clean_post_comment_message.defaultValue:
Thank you {username} for posting on this subreddit! Hope it follows our Rules and Guidelines.

Thank you for being amazing, y'all and hope everyone has a great day <3

I am a bot, and this action was performed automatically. Please contact the moderators of this subreddit if you have any questions or concerns.

ban_repeat_violators.label: Ban repeat violators
ban_repeat_violators.helpText: Ban a user after their second WholesomeShield violation in the subreddit.

modmail_notifications.label: Modmail notifications
modmail_notifications.helpText: Choose when WholesomeShield should create a moderator notification in modmail.

include_profile_details_in_modmail.label: Modmail user profile details
include_profile_details_in_modmail.helpText: Include username, author ID, profile link, account age, karma, NSFW flag, and subreddit karma when available.

include_content_details_in_modmail.label: Modmail content details
include_content_details_in_modmail.helpText: Include removed content title, body, URL, flair, media URLs, report count, and report reasons.

include_detection_details_in_modmail.label: Modmail detection details
include_detection_details_in_modmail.helpText: Include matched WholesomeShield reasons and scores in moderator notifications.

scan_limit.label: Automatic scan limit
scan_limit.helpText: How many recent or unmoderated items to check each automatic scan. Values above 100 are capped.
